title: Reusable Plastic Plates 100 Count, 9-Inch Heavy-Duty Party Plates, Sturdy & Hard, BPA-Free & Microwave Safe Dinnerware for Parties, Picnics & Events
features: UNBEATABLE STRENGTH & DURABILITY: Our 15-gram heavy-duty plastic plates are built to handle even the heaviest meals without bending or buckling. Unlike flimsy alternatives, these rigid plates provide steady support for everything from hearty BBQs to full-course dinners, keeping your food secure and your table mess-free.

PREMIUM QUALITY, EXCEPTIONAL VALUE: Crafted with an extra-thick design, these plastic plates reusable deliver lasting reliability for every gathering. Each 100-pack offers consistent performance that cuts down on waste and provides better support than cheaper, single-use plates. A trusted option that balances long-term durability with everyday convenience.

SAFE, COMFORTABLE & CONVENIENT: Designed with smooth, rounded edges and made from BPA-free materials, these plates are safe for guests of all ages. Their waterproof construction ensures they hold up during any meal, while the stackable design makes them easy to carry, store, and organize before or after events.

THE PERFECT PLATE FOR ANY OCCASION: At 9 inches, these versatile plates suit everything from family dinners to large parties. Ideal for birthdays, showers, picnics, BBQs, and more, they bring style to both indoor and outdoor tables. The classic white finish blends seamlessly with any setting, adding a touch of elegance.

DESIGNED FOR EFFORTLESS ENJOYMENT: Microwave-safe and simple to clean, these plates move easily from serving to reheating without the need for extra dishes. Their reusable design reduces kitchen clutter while offering quick cleanup, so you can focus on what matters most—sharing meals and moments with loved ones.
